name: Sailor Frank
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a semi-thawed frankfurter for easier cutting.
2. With a knife, make a straight horizontal slit about 1 inch from the top of the frank.
3. On both sides of this slit, make slits upward to create arms.
4. From the bottom of the frank, cut a 1-inch slit upwards to create legs.
5. Place the frank in the oven and broil until cooked through.
6. As it cooks, the arms and legs will curl outward slightly, giving it a more person-like appearance.
7. Remove from the oven and decorate with mustard or catsup.
8. Add eyes, mouth, buttons, shoes, etc. Kids love this dish, especially if they can help with decorating!
